description: Read-only MCP server for J&L Security, a security systems installer in Essex and Greater London (established 2011, SSAIB, CHAS, FIA and BAFE accredited). Tools cover company contact details, services, service-area coverage, indicative pricing and published guides.

tools.name: get_company_info
tools.description: Contact details, accreditations, opening hours and service area for J&L Security.

tools.name: list_services
tools.description: List the security services J&L Security installs and maintains.

tools.name: get_service_details
tools.description: Features and benefits of a specific J&L Security service.

tools.name: check_service_area
tools.description: Check whether J&L Security covers a given town or UK postcode.

tools.name: get_pricing_guide
tools.description: Indicative installed costs for alarms, CCTV and fire systems.

tools.name: list_blog_articles
tools.description: List J&L Security guide articles with their URLs.
